tabs.name: main
tabs.code:
# @viz
def create_graph():
	graph = Graph()
 
	nodes_info=[None, 'virtual', 'virtual', 'virtual', 'virtual', 'virtual', 'virtual', None, 'virtual', 'virtual']
	nodes = [graph.add_node(info) for info in nodes_info]
 
	positions = [(9,7), (9,12), (12,12), (9,15), (12,15), (3,12), (9,4), (3,7), (3,4), (6,7)]
	for node, position in zip(nodes, positions):
		node._viz.x, node._viz.y = position
        
	connections = [(0,1),(1,2),(2,3),(3,1),(1,4),(4,2),(0,5),(5,1),(0,6),(6,0),(7,8),(8,9),(9,7),(7,5),(9,6)]
	edge_info =[None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None,None]
	for (i,j), info in zip(connections, edge_info):
		edge = graph.add_edge(nodes[i], nodes[j], info)
		edge._viz.set_start(nodes[i]._viz.x, nodes[i]._viz.y)
		edge._viz.set_end(nodes[j]._viz.x, nodes[j]._viz.y)
 
	return graph

buttons_panel = create_buttons()

run_scc_btn = LabeledRect(label='Run SCC', x=9)
run_scc_btn.rect.on_click = lambda x, y: scc(graph)
buttons_panel.add(run_scc_btn)
          
graph = no_debug(create_graph)()

no_trace()
# @end

def scc(graph: Graph):
    dfs_visited = [False] * len(graph.nodes)        
    finished_nodes = []
    transpose_graph = False

    def _dfs(node: Node, parent_edge: Edge | None):
        if dfs_visited[node.index]:
            # @viz
            dfs_arrow.x, dfs_arrow.y = node._viz.x+1, node._viz.y+1
            if parent_edge is not None:
                parent_edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_UNUSED_COLOR)
            # @end
            return
        # @viz
        dfs_arrow.x, dfs_arrow.y = node._viz.x+1, node._viz.y+1
        node._viz.set_color(NODE_VISIT_COLOR)
        cur_time = dfs_time[0]
        dfs_time[0] += 1
        node._viz.set_label(cur_time)
        if parent_edge is not None:
            parent_edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_VISIT_COLOR)
        # @end
        dfs_visited[node.index] = True
        if transpose_graph:
            for edge in node.ingoing:
                _dfs(edge.from_node, edge)
                # @viz
                dfs_arrow.x, dfs_arrow.y = node._viz.x+1, node._viz.y+1
                # @end
        else: 
            for edge in node.outgoing:
                _dfs(edge.to_node, edge)
                # @viz
                dfs_arrow.x, dfs_arrow.y = node._viz.x+1, node._viz.y+1
                # @end
        # @viz
        node._viz.set_color(NODE_FINISH_COLOR)
        if parent_edge is not None:
            parent_edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_FINISH_COLOR)

        node._viz.set_label(f'{cur_time}:{dfs_time[0]}')
        dfs_time[0] += 1
        # @end
        finished_nodes.append(node)

    # @viz
    dfs_time = [0]
    dfs_arrow = Arrow(angle=-45)
    no_trace()
    # @end
    for node in graph.nodes:
        if not dfs_visited[node.index]:
            _dfs(node, None)
    # @viz
    for edge in graph.edges:
        edge._viz.set_color(EDGE_BASE_COLOR)
        edge._viz.line.end_cap = 'none'
        edge._viz.line.start_cap = 'arrow'
    for node in graph.nodes:
        node._viz.set_color(NODE_BASE_COLOR)

    dfs_time = [0]
    # @end

    transpose_graph = True
    dfs_visited = [False] * len(graph.nodes)   
    for node in finished_nodes[::-1]:
        if not dfs_visited[node.index]:
            _dfs(node, None)
    # @viz          
    dfs_arrow.delete()
    for edge in graph.edges:
        edge._viz.line.start_cap = 'none'
        edge._viz.line.end_cap = 'arrow'
    # @end
